title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-328 ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privil
id: 4681d1a7-1fc9-5dd5-ac02-3825682fc4ed
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: PRIVESC
references:

    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering

modified: 2026/06/04
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        EventID:
            - 4672
            - 4673
        PrivilegeList|contains:
            - 'SeDebugPrivilege'
            - 'SeImpersonatePrivilege'
            - 'SeTcbPrivilege'
    selection_newservice:
        EventID: 4697
        ServiceName|contains: 'PSEXE'
    condition: selection_token or selection_newservice
falsepositives:
    - System administrators performing maintenance
    - Legitimate service installations
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T19:36:51Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - PRIVESC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3693483; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks
id: b2a22d24-ff90-53ff-9e7f-4a3a3eb357bb
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/04
modified: 2026/06/04
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T19:36:50Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CISA Warns of critical Magento Cache Warmer RCE flaw Exploited in Attacks Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2450738; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
